title: Citizens Financial Group Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2023 Earnings Conference Call Details
text: PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--As previously announced, Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: CFG) will report its fourth quarter and full year 2023 earnings on January 17, 2024. The news release and supplemental materials will be available at http://investor.citizensbank.com. CFG management will host a live conference call that morning with details as follows: Time:   9:00 am (ET) Dial-in:   Individuals may call in by dialing 877-226-8189, conference ID 6086305 Webcast/Presentation:   The.

title: Citizens Financial Group Preferred D Shares Set To Float At Yields Near 9.5%
text: Citizens Financial Group's Series D preferred shares are expected to begin floating and offer a dividend yield approaching 9.5%. The bank has managed to increase its net interest income, despite higher interest expenses and has stabilized its deposit base. Investors should monitor the bank's leverage ratio, loan balance, and uninsured deposits as potential risks.

title: First Republic Crashed and Burned. This Bank Wants to Copy Its Business.
text: Citizens Financial is scooping up bankers from First Republic. Executives say they will copy only the good parts of the failed bank.

title: 3 Bill Gross Bank Stocks to Add to Your Buy List
text: Bill Gross, the Bond King, is back in the news this week. Last week, I detailed how Bill Gross focused on equity arbitrage opportunities while forecasting a recession.

title: Citizens Financial Group to Participate at the Goldman Sachs U.S. Financial Services Conference
text: PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: CFG) announced today that Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Bruce Van Saun will participate at the Goldman Sachs U.S. Financial Services Conference on Tuesday, December 5, 2023 at 10:00 am ET. The live webcast will be available at http://investor.citizensbank.com under Events & Presentations. About Citizens Financial Group, Inc. title: 7 Dirt-Cheap Bank Stocks with Massive Dividends
text: Bank stocks are down badly this year. Borrowing costs are sky-high, cutting into net interest income.

title: US regional banks shares surge after Bill Gross says they have hit bottom
text: Shares of a handful of U.S. regional banks popped on Thursday after famed bond investor Bill Gross said the danger in investing in them had passed.
